text:

Log:
  x11-servers/xwayland: expose x11/nvidia-driver support

  Disabled for now as runtime wasn't tested. EGLStreams is supported by
  x11-wm/mutter and x11-wm/plasma5-kwin.

  Approved by:	zeising (x11)
